description: Style NoteA brand known world over for its classic cuts and impeccable quality standards fcuk definitely delivers the goods with this Polo neck T- Shirt. Its pure cotton composition wicks away sweat lets you stay comfortable in Summer. Pair it with sandals and distressed denims for a day out with friends.Product DetailsLight brown striped polo T-shirt, has a slim spread collar, three buttoned placket, branding on the left chest, short sleeves, back yoke and a vented hemlineMaterial and Care 100% cottonMachine wash coldIron on reverseSize and FitRegular FitThe model(height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
